description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two dark, irregular-shaped objects are visible just right of the center in the upper right quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B16
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a still image, derived from a U.S. military system, to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025. The image, titled 'FBI Photo B16', displays a grainy, monochrome view with a central crosshair targeting two dark, irregular-shaped objects. The original imagery was redacted before submission, and an accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported an inability to positively identify the UAP. The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.
reported_object_description: Two dark, irregular-shaped objects are visible just right of the center in the upper right quadrant.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the document provides only a single, low-quality, grainy, black-and-white image from surveillance footage. There is no description of kinematics, no corroborating witnesses beyond a single 'operator,' and no multi-sensor data. The object description is vague ('dark, irregular-shaped objects'), which is consistent with numerous mundane explanations for a low-quality visual observation.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B16 - Page 1

[Redacted]

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| [Redacted] | [Redacted] |
| [Redacted] | [Redacted] |
| [Redacted] | [Redacted] |

[Image: Grainy, black-and-white surveillance footage showing a central crosshair targeting a small, dark, unidentified object.]

12/31/99 18:20:41
cover_up_reasoning: The document, despite being a single page, features extensive redactions. Entire blocks of what appears to be contextual information or metadata surrounding the image are blacked out, indicated by multiple '[Redacted]' entries. This goes beyond routine redaction of personal identifiers and suggests substantial concealment of the photo's context or origin.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。该图像题为“联邦调查局照片B16”，显示为颗粒状的单色视图，中央十字线瞄准两个深色、不规则形状的物体。原始图像在提交前经过编辑，且未提供随附的任务报告。操作员报告无法明确识别该UAP。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）不正确，系因系统日期/时间未设置所致。
reported_object_description_zh: 在右上象限，中心偏右处可见两个深色、不规则形状的物体。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该事件的破绽度高，因为该文件仅提供了一张来自监控录像的单一、低质量、颗粒状的黑白图像。没有运动学描述，除了一名“操作员”之外没有其他佐证目击者，也没有多传感器数据。物体描述模糊（“深色、不规则形状的物体”），这与对低质量视觉观测的众多普通解释相符。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 尽管该文件仅为一页，但存在大量编辑。图像周围看似上下文信息或元数据的整个区块被涂黑，由多个“[已编辑]”条目表示。这超出了个人身份信息的常规编辑范围，并暗示对照片的背景或来源进行了实质性隐瞒。
claims: Still image of UAP submitted by FBI to AARO
Image shows two dark, irregular-shaped objects
Operator unable to positively identify the UAP
Image derived from a U.S. military system
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交的UAP静态图像
图像显示两个深色、不规则形状的物体
图像源自美国军事系统
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact: The image is described as 'grainy, black-and-white surveillance footage,' which is highly susceptible to optical artifacts that could appear as small, dark, irregular shapes.

Bird, bat, or insect at close range: A small animal flying close to a surveillance camera, especially in low-light or low-resolution conditions, could easily appear as an 'irregular-shaped object' without clear identifying features.
Consumer drone (DJI / quadcopter): A small drone, particularly if viewed at a distance or in poor lighting/resolution, could present as a dark, irregular shape, consistent with the description.
bust_explanations_zh: 镜头光晕或相机伪影：该图像被描述为“颗粒状的黑白监控录像”，极易产生光学伪影，这些伪影可能表现为小型、深色、不规则的形状。
近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫：小型动物在监控摄像头附近飞行，尤其是在低光照或低分辨率条件下，很容易呈现为“不规则形状的物体”，且没有清晰的识别特征。
消费级无人机（DJI/四轴飞行器）：小型无人机，尤其是在远距离或光照/分辨率不佳的情况下观察，可能呈现为深色、不规则的形状，与描述相符。
cover_up_indicators: Entire blocks of contextual information redacted
cover_up_indicators_zh: 整个上下文信息区块被编辑
元数据表中存在多个“[已编辑]”条目
